2003June 22, 2003

🇩🇪 Stuttgart, Germany

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Stuttgart, Germany, June 22, 2003 -- June 27, 2003

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2003-06-stuttgart-germany

19 Resolutions

585Plenary
Encourage ISO/TC 37 to coordinate with WG 2 on multilingual classification
To avoid duplication or contradictory work, SC 4 wishes to encourage ISO/TC 37 to inform ISO/TC 184/SC 4/WG 2 about the actual status on "Basic principles of multilingual classification for electro...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
584Plenary
Support German initiative for ISO/IEC Guide on parts library definitions
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 strongly supports the German initiative to create an ISO/IEC Guide for the common use of parts library definitions to encourage all IEC and ISO committees dealing with the standardi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
583Plenary
Register STEP MIME-types with IANA Registration Authority
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to register STEP Part 21 MIME-types with the Internet IANA Registration Authority as .stp, and .step.for files according to ISO 10303 Application protocols and .p21 fo...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
582Plenary
Create ad hoc group to assess ASAM ODS 5.0 PAS proposal
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group led by Len Slovensky to assess the proposal from ASAM to transpose the ODS 5.0 specification into a Publicly Available Specification (PAS).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
581Plenary
Endorse cancellation of the Xi'an meeting
SC 4 endorses the decision of the Chair and Secretariat to cancel the Xi'an meeting scheduled for October 2003, due to natural events beyond the control of the organisers, and instructs its secreta...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
580Plenary
Establish liaison with the OASIS consortium
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to establish a liaison to the OASIS consortium, nominates David Leal as the liaison officer, and requests the Secretariat to make the appointment.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
579Plenary
Establish liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31
In accordance with ISO/TC 184 resolution # 320, SC 4 requests its Secretariat to take the necessary actions to implement a liaison between ISO/TC 184/SC 4 and ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 31 and its WG 2, and ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
578Plenary
Approve Jerry Smith as liaison to ISO/TC 211 and JSG
SC 4 approves Jerry Smith as the liaison from SC 4 to ISO/TC 211 - Geographic Information Systems/Geomatics and the ISO/IEC Joint Steering Group on Spatial Standardization and Related Interoperabil...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
577Plenary
Approve Tatsuo Terai as liaison officer to ISO/TC 10
SC 4 approves Tatsuo Terai to serve as the Liaison Officer to ISO/TC 10 for a period of two years and requests its Secretariat to make the appointment accordingly.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
576Plenary
Appoint Mats Elgh as Quality Coordinator
SC 4 appoints Mats Elgh from Sweden as the new Quality Coordinator, for a three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
575Plenary
Appoint Guy Pierra as Deputy Convener of WG 2
SC 4 appoints Guy Pierra as Deputy Convener of WG 2 for an additional three-year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
574Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0055 |Mike Pratt |Mike Pratt |ISO 10303-0523 |Lothar Kl...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Rob Anderson for his commitment and efforts in leading quality activities in SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Alain Bezos for his liaison role with ISO/TC 10 and accepts his resignation from that position.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 wishes to thank Bernd Wenzel for his liaison role with ISO/TC 211 and the ISO/IEC Joint Spatial Group (JSG) since June 1997 and accepts his resignation from this position.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

Acclamation

Acclamation
Appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons. We appreciate your representation to and for ISO/TC 184/SC 4. A special thank you to the SC 4 Liaison Plenary presenters for their insightful and comprehensive pr...

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
